title: Stop perfecting your prompt. Do this instead
summary: Jeff Su recommends shifting focus from prompt perfection to context engineering. He explains three concepts: grounding (providing reference documents), RAG (retrieval-augmented generation for citing sources), and context engineering (assembling all needed information rather than just optimizing wording).
